source: Step 2 sub-pilot · 90 cells · 5 iv × 3 dur × 2 workloads × 3 reps

recommendations.rationale: low-rhythm steady workload; cheap iv preserves coverage
transient bursts need fast iv to catch ~100-500 ms events
checkpoint cadence ~1-5 s; 500 ms gives sufficient temporal coverage
steady throughput workloads tolerate slow iv
phase boundaries at ~1-5 s; 500 ms gives ≥ 2 samples per phase
inherits from child workload it drives

caveats: F1/CV columns are NULL across all 90 cells because Step 2 ran without --keep-dumps. Recommendations are design-justified, not empirically grounded by analyzer output.
workingset_sweep_v2 cells logged mlock(512 MiB) failure: working-set page distribution was partly paged out. Fix VM RLIMIT_MEMLOCK or reduce --working-set-mb to 256 before re-capture.
C3 (n_windows >= 50 at canonical 128/64) fails for every cell. Plan 03 (window/hop tuning) is the proper response, not lengthening Step 2 durations further.
next_steps: D-50: operator fixes VM mlock capability or reduces --working-set-mb
D-51: analyzer-then-delete hook (D-44) wired into plan02_run.py; ~150 LOC
Plan-02 v2 capture: smaller targeted sweep that measures F1/CV at each recommended iv to confirm or revise the table
D-52: Plan 03 (window/hop tuning) unblocks; n_windows < 50 directly motivates the smaller window/hop choice
